title: Allow using Verilated types in C++ `constexpr` contexts

features.name: verilator_public_localparam_unpacked_array
features.description: Code should include a localparam unpacked array marked with /* verilator public */ that generates a VlUnpacked type in C++

features.name: constexpr_access_of_verilated_array
features.description: Code should include a constexpr function that accesses a verilator public array via operator[] in a constant expression context
features.snippet: constexpr int bar(std::size_t index) { return Vsomething::foo[index]; }

features.name: vlunpacked_array_literal_initialization
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array initialized with a replication literal that generates VlUnpacked storage in C++
